name: dmn-js
when_to_use: 把业务规则/决策逻辑渲成规范的 DMN 决策表(hit policy、typed input/output 列、FEEL 表达式、annotation)或 DRD 决策需求图时用它,而非手搭 HTML 表格——手工表会丢 hit-policy 标记、annotation 与联动的 DRD,且表+图一致性难维持。仅当 hit policy/FEEL/决策图有语义意义时选它;普通电子表格用 grid 库。
why_valuable: DMN 决策表是 grid+graph 复合产物,有精确语义(hit policy 聚合、typed 列、规则行);AI 手搭会静默丢语义标记且无法自动布局 DRD 图。dmn-js 是 bpmn.io 官方栈,从 DMN XML 确定性渲出 spec-correct 的决策表与 DRD。

en.when_to_use: Use it to render business rules or decision logic as a standard DMN decision table (hit policy, typed input/output columns, FEEL expressions, annotations) or a DRD decision-requirements diagram instead of assembling an HTML table by hand, which loses hit-policy markers, annotations, and the linked DRD and makes table/diagram consistency difficult. Choose it only when hit policy, FEEL, or the decision diagram carries semantic meaning; use a grid library for an ordinary spreadsheet.
en.why_valuable: A DMN decision table is a compound grid-and-graph artifact with precise semantics (hit-policy aggregation, typed columns, and rule rows); a hand-built AI version silently drops semantic markers and cannot lay out the DRD automatically. dmn-js is the official bpmn.io stack and deterministically renders spec-correct decision tables and DRDs from DMN XML.

data_in.note: dmnXml is standard DMN 1.3 XML: <definitions> contains <decision><decisionTable> with <input>/<output>/<rule>, where each rule has <inputEntry>/<outputEntry> FEEL text. A DRD needs a <dmndi:DMNDI> diagram-interchange section for layout; without DMNDI, the decision-table view can still render but the DRD has no coordinates. The Viewer automatically selects a drd, decisionTable, literalExpression, or boxedExpression view from the XML contents.

schema.dmnXml: string -- DMN 1.3 XML string; importXML returns {warnings} or throws on a parse failure

spec.note: The decision table is HTML and the DRD is a diagram-js SVG canvas; both read the container size. Give the container an explicit 400px height with scrolling; do not use vh or percentage heights.

license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE (bpmn.io license —— MIT 文本 + 强制 bpmn.io watermark 必须保持可见,不得移除/遮挡)

data_in.note: dmnXml 是标准 DMN 1.3 XML:<definitions> 内含 <decision><decisionTable> 带 <input>/<output>/<rule>(rule 内 <inputEntry>/<outputEntry> 为 FEEL 文本)。DRD 图需 <dmndi:DMNDI> 图形交换段提供布局;只给决策逻辑而无 DMNDI 时,决策表视图仍可渲染,DRD 视图无坐标。Viewer 按 XML 内容自动选 drd / decisionTable / literalExpression / boxedExpression 视图。

schema.dmnXml: string —— DMN 1.3 XML 字符串;importXML 解析失败返回 {warnings} 或抛错

spec.note: 决策表为 HTML、DRD 为 diagram-js SVG canvas,都读容器尺寸;容器给显式 400px 高并滚动,禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: DMN XML 冗长且强 schema,minimal 给一张最小合法决策表(无 DMNDI→渲成决策表视图)。

minimal.dmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20191111/MODEL/" id="defs" name="defs" namespace="http://example">
  <decision id="d1" name="Discount">
    <decisionTable id="t1" hitPolicy="UNIQUE">
      <input id="i1" label="Customer"><inputExpression id="ie1" typeRef="string"><text>customer</text></inputExpression></input>
      <output id="o1" label="Discount" typeRef="number" />
      <rule id="r1"><inputEntry id="ie_r1"><text>"VIP"</text></inputEntry><outputEntry id="oe_r1"><text>20</text></outputEntry></rule>
      <rule id="r2"><inputEntry id="ie_r2"><text>"Regular"</text></inputEntry><outputEntry id="oe_r2"><text>5</text></outputEntry></rule>
    </decisionTable>
  </decision>
</definitions>

empty.dmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20191111/MODEL/" id="empty" name="empty" namespace="http://example"><decision id="d0" name="d0"><decisionTable id="t0"><output id="o0" /></decisionTable></decision></definitions>

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;决策表编辑或元素选中若需外传,由消费 AI 直接接 dmn-js 原生事件总线(viewer.on(...))并按载体处理,不预设统一事件契约。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:font-src 仅 gstatic→dmn-font 图标被拦(核心表格内容仍在,图标降级);CJS→+esm 大依赖树加载未实测
carriers.widget: conditional:允许 CDN 字体;需把 diagram-js.css + dmn-js-*.css + dmn-font 显式 <link> 进 shadow;watermark 须保持可见(license)
carriers.codex: conditional:允许 jsDelivr CSS/字体;同 widget 需手动挂 CSS+字体;+esm 依赖链加载未实测

isolation.evidence: API verified vs dmn-js@17.10.0: lib/index.js `export { default } from './Viewer'`;Viewer extends dmn-js-shared Manager;Manager.js:87 `importXML(xml, options)`(wrapForCompatibility 包装,返回 {warnings});Manager 构造吃 { container }。渲染落用户提供的容器:Manager.js:341 `parentNode.appendChild(this._container)`、:367 `this._container = container`——不注入 document.body。globalStyleInjection=no:bpmn.io 惯例 CSS 为独立 dist/assets/*.css 文件(diagram-js.css/dmn-js-*.css/dmn-font),由使用者显式引入,库不自动注 head。globalDomMutation=yes:在容器内建 SVG(DRD)/HTML(decisionTable)子树 + 可能的拖拽 helper。globalEvents=yes:diagram-js 挂 pointer/wheel/keyboard 交互监听,拖拽期可能挂 document。shadowCompatible=conditional:视图渲进提供的容器可落 shadow,但图标字体 @font-face + 多张 CSS 必须手动接进 shadow,且 license 要求 bpmn.io watermark 保持可见。license=SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE(MIT 文本 + 强制 watermark)。confidence=medium:API 为成熟 bpmn.io 契约,+esm 大依赖树实际加载与 CSS/字体接入未真机验证。
